assertion_results.text: The scope summary correctly includes the pre-condition about user existence in the database
assertion_results.evidence: 'Pre-condition = user exists in the database' — pré-condição corretamente extraída do prompt.

assertion_results.text: The scope summary correctly includes the post-condition about HTTP 200 with name, email, and avatar_url fields
assertion_results.evidence: 'Post-condition = HTTP 200 with JSON body containing name, email, and avatar_url' — pós-condição com todos os três campos presentes.

assertion_results.text: The scope summary correctly includes the invariant about no new external dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: 'Invariants = no new external dependencies, no database migrations' — invariantes corretamente extraídas.

assertion_results.text: The output does NOT ask questions about information already explicitly provided in the prompt (pre-conditions, post-conditions, and invariants are all given)
assertion_results.evidence: 'Therefore, the skill must NOT ask any redundant questions.' — nenhuma pergunta formulada no output; todas as informações extraídas diretamente do contexto.
